summary: Tested BIB card + Gmail email feature: 6/6 backend tests passed, all frontend testids verified. Email sending to Gmail SMTP is confirmed working (logs show 'BIB email sent to runkumbh@gmail.com').

design_issues.screen: BIB Card Preview (inside Registration Details modal)
issues: Generated BIB card image looks visually sparse/minimal for BIB OSM001 (teal/orange bands with small cream rectangle + barcode). Text inside the card appears to be rendered tiny or cut off. Consider reviewing generate_bib_card() layout — participant name, BIB number text, and category label don't appear visible in the preview image. Not a functional bug — image is a valid base64 PNG that downloads and emails correctly.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Review generate_bib_card() in /app/backend/server.py ~line 291 — participant name, BIB number, event category text look clipped or invisible on generated PNG for existing registration OSM001. All functional behavior is fine.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is 1217 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Should be split into routers (admin_router.py, payments_router.py, email_router.py) for maintainability.

send_bib_email() in resend endpoint returns sent:true/false but swallows SMTP exceptions inside email_service — frontend cannot distinguish soft failure vs success. Consider returning error detail when sent=false.
The resend endpoint regenerates the BIB card if missing but does not verify event existence (event.get returns None -> default strings) — fine but could log a warning.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical test-ids verified, modal + email flow works)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up a TEST_* manual registration via /api/admin/registrations. Existing BIB OSM001 used for resend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BIB email feature fully working end-to-end. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/registrations (auto-emails on create), POST /api/admin/registrations/{id}/send-email (resend, returns {sent,email,bib_number}, 404 on missing), GET /api/admin/registrations (includes bib_card data URL + bib_number). Frontend testids verified: view-details-OSM001, download-bib-OSM001, resend-email-OSM001, delete-registration-OSM001, details-modal, bib-card-preview-image, modal-download-bib, modal-resend-email, close-details-modal. Gmail SMTP confirmed working from preview env (logs: 'BIB email sent to runkumbh@gmail.com (BIB OSM001)'). Note minor visual issue: generate_bib_card() PNG rendering looks sparse — text may be clipped.

backend: POST /api/admin/registrations creates registration & triggers email (log verified) — PASS
frontend: BIB card preview image renders (data:image/png;base64,... confirmed) — PASS
modal-resend-email click triggers /send-email + shows 'Email Sent' toast — PASS
close-details-modal X button closes modal — PASS
